title: Michael MacDonald
summary: Co-author of this archive and a five-year session participant — from the July 2020 Ori sessions to the December 2025 memorial.
markdown:
**Michael MacDonald** stands on both sides of the record: he is the co-author of this
archive alongside [Dr. Kosol Ouch](/lore/kosol-ouch/) — and he is *in* it, a questioner
across five years of sessions, named in the title of the July 13, 2020
[UniMetrix & Ori](/lore/ori/) session.

His questions carry a characteristic geopolitical bent. In that July session he
introduces himself formally to the interface: *"UniMetrix, can I make an enquiry? My name
is Michael McDonald. I am looking into the connections between Canada and the Chinese
government?"* — one of the record's recurring Canada-watchers. He returns through the
autumn 2020 sessions and is still present at the December 2025
[TetraKlein](/lore/tetraklein/) session, among the community voices absorbing the news of
James Rink's passing.

That the record's co-editor appears inside the record is part of the archive's character:
this is a community documenting itself from within — the transcriber asking questions in
the transcript.
